case_title: CACH, LLC VS. JENNIFER C DUMPIT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REDUCED FILING FEE RE : VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-09-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DUMPIT, JENNIFER C AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-14-2014
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (RE: POS OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DUMPIT, JENNIFER C AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-09-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
